CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, content STRING);
SELECT substr(content, 3, 2) AS sub_content FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, substr(content, 1, length(content)) AS full_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT substr(content, -1, 1) AS last_char FROM test_strings;
SELECT substr(content, 1, 10) AS sub_content FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT substr((SELECT content FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4), 1, 4) AS sub_content;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, related_id INT);
SELECT t1.id, substr(t1.content, 2, 3) AS sub_str, t2.related_id FROM test_strings t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.related_id;
SELECT id, substr(content, CASE WHEN LENGTH(content) > 2 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END, 2) AS conditional_substr FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, substr(content, GREATEST(1, 1), 2) AS safe_substr FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN LENGTH(content) < 4 THEN substr(content, 1, 1) ELSE substr(content, 2, 2) END AS substr_case FROM test_strings;
